text.title: django-pytest-integration Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for django-pytest-integration as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: assert response.status_code == 200 without checking the response body.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A 200 response with an empty or malformed body is a bug. Always assert at least one field from response.data to verify the contract: assert response.data["email"] == user.email.

failure-mode.description: Testing through the view layer to test service logic.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: View tests are slow (HTTP overhead) and test many things at once. Test service methods directly for business logic. Integration tests verify the end-to-end contract; they don't replace unit tests on the service.
